channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: ROI of AI Test Automation: A Calculation Framework for QA Leaders
item.description: Every QA leader has faced the same conversation. Leadership asks: "What are we getting for our automation investment?" And the honest answer is often some version of "we're faster than we used to...

item.title: How to Define and Enforce Vulnerability Remediation SLAs in 2026
item.description: Illustration showing vulnerability remediation SLA deadlines by severity Back to blog What Are Vulnerability Remediation SLAs? Why MTTR Is the Ultimate Measure of Security Posture Understanding...

item.title: The Software Architect Roadmap: What to Learn (and in What Order)
item.description: Software architecture is about much more than writing code. A great Software Architect understands how systems are designed, built, deployed, secured, scaled, and maintained throughout their...

item.title: My Indie Hacker Launch Strategy: What I'd Do Differently
item.description: Most Indie Hacker Launches Fail Before Anyone Sees Them Building in public has become the dominant piece of advice in the indie hacker world, but most people who do it still launch to silence. A...

item.title: Ollama Model Loading RCE: Three Years of the Same Bug Class, One Self-Hosted LLM Runtime
item.description: TL;DR Ollama has shipped three remote-code-execution vulnerabilities in three years, all at the model-loading boundary. CVE-2024-37032 ("Probllama", Wiz Research, 2024) was a...

item.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super: The Open AI Model That Just Beat GPT on Coding (March 2026)
item.description: On March 11, 2026, during NVIDIA's GTC conference, the company released something that quietly rewrote the leaderboard for open AI models. NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120-billion-parameter hybrid...

item.title: 개발자 친구도 못 알아들어서, 제일 쉽게 다시 씁니다 — 스타일시드가 하는 일
item.description: 어제 개발자 친구한테 카톡이 왔습니다. "그 design md 잖아? 토스나 글로벌웹 토큰 추출한 거 샘플로 들어있고. 그럼 스타일시드를 쓰면 어떤 측면에서 일반 개발자들이 도움을 받음?" 10년 넘게 개발한 친구인데도 "디자인 룰 엔진"이라는 설명으로는 감이 안 온다는 겁니다. 제 잘못이죠. 그래서 그때 카톡으로 했던 설명을 그대로, 제일 쉬운...

item.title: How WooCommerce REST API Powers External Order Management (And Why It Beats Plugins)
item.description: If you've built or maintained a WooCommerce store at scale, you've probably hit the moment where the built-in order management stops being enough. More channels, more warehouses, more SKUs and...

item.title: Migrating from Tricentis to Katalon: What to Expect and How to Plan
item.description: Tricentis Tosca has been a strong choice for enterprise test automation, particularly for organizations with SAP-heavy environments and teams that prefer a model-based, codeless approach. It...

item.title: I wanted Snowflake to do more than store data. So I built a pipeline where it judges World Cup conviction, then writes its verdict back to Solana. The architecture ended up being my favorite part of the project.
item.description: We Taught a Snowflake Warehouse to Judge World Cup Conviction and Write the Verdict Back to Solana DEV Weekend Challenge: Passion Edition Submission Soumyadeep Dey Soumyadeep Dey Soumyadeep Dey...

item.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
item.description: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

item.title: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
item.description: Skullcandy announced a new version of its Crusher wireless headphones today featuring a few of Bose's audio technologies including its QuietControl ANC and head-tracking spatial audio. The Crusher...

item.title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
item.description: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

item.title: HP’s OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
item.description: With storage and memory prices still at an all-time high, we’re happy to tell you about a solid deal on a good laptop when we find one, rare as they are. Best Buy is selling the HP OmniBook X Flip...

item.title: Apple’s reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
item.description: An AppleCare Plus subscription for a Mac or iPad will cost more soon, with prices going up by $0.50 per month or $5 per year for new sign-ups while remaining the same for existing subscribers,...

item.title: Valve says iFixit will keep selling Steam Deck batteries after all
item.description: Valve has been incredibly friendly to customers who need repairs - which is why it was so surprising to hear that Valve was already discontinuing the battery for the Steam Deck LCD handheld. It...

item.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
item.description: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

item.title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
item.description: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI...

item.title: Brendan Carr plans to let broadcast giants dominate the airwaves
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission will vote next month on whether a single company can own broadcast stations that reach more than 39 percent of US TV households. In a Breitbart op-ed on...

item.title: Roblox is shutting down its video chat service
item.description: Roblox will be shutting down Roblox Connect, its video calling service introduced in 2023. Roblox Connect let you video chat with other people using your Roblox avatar, which would be able to...

item.title: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
item.description: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between...

item.title: Windows 0-day drops the same day Microsoft releases record number of patches
item.description: HiveLegacy is a "powerful primitive" that's likely capable of other nefarious actions.

item.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
item.description: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

item.title: TuxBot v3 Evolution Shows Signs of LLM-Assisted IoT Botnet Development
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a previously unreported Internet-of-Things (IoT) botnet framework dubbed TuxBot v3 Evolution that shows signs of being developed with assistance...

item.title: AI Isn’t Smarter Than a Baby—Yet
item.description: Babies are tremendous learning machines, and key advances for AI may soon be found in the architecture of their little brains.

item.title: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
item.description: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

item.title: Thinking Machines Lab Drops Its First Model
item.description: Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open source model, was trained to understand video and audio. It could help Thinking Machines establish itself among competitors like Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
item.description: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

item.title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
